title: Tencent-Backed Broker Aims to Expand in Japan’s Options Market
description: Moomoo Securities Japan Co., a digital brokerage, plans to expand its business in single-stock options for Japanese equities to capitalize on growing demand from the country’s retail investors.
content: Moomoo Securities Japan Co., a digital brokerage, plans to expand its business in single-stock options for Japanese equities to capitalize on growing demand from the country’s retail investors.
